title: Bridge to Polygon - Open App
meta_description: bridge to polygon using Polygon Portal to connect your wallet, select a supported route, review gas, and open the official app.
hero_h2: Move assets onto Polygon PoS through the official portal
hero_lead: bridge to polygon opens Polygon Portal for moving supported assets from Ethereum and other available routes into the Polygon PoS ecosystem after you connect a wallet and review each transaction.
what_is: Polygon Portal is the official Polygon interface for bridging, swapping, and managing assets on Polygon, linked from the Polygon site. Use it to connect a wallet, choose a route, and send supported tokens to Polygon PoS.

how.d: Open Polygon Portal and connect the wallet holding the source-chain funds.
Select the source network, Polygon PoS as destination, and a supported token.
Check token, network, recipient wallet, gas, and approvals before signing.
After confirmation, follow status in the portal or verify activity on Polygonscan.

points.p: Polygon lists Portal as the place to bridge, swap, and manage assets on Polygon, so the primary action should route to the verified app domain.
A careful flow separates source chain, destination network, token, gas, and wallet prompts before the transfer is signed.
When a Polygon-side transaction is available, users can verify it on Polygonscan.

faq.q: How do I bridge to polygon from Ethereum?
faq.a: Open Polygon Portal, connect your wallet, choose Ethereum as the source and Polygon PoS as the destination, then review the route and wallet prompts before signing.

faq.q: Is bridge to polygon an official Polygon app?
faq.a: The official destination is Polygon Portal at portal.polygon.technology/bridge; verify the domain before connecting a wallet.

faq.q: What wallet do I need to bridge to polygon?
faq.a: Use a compatible self-custody wallet that supports the source network and Polygon PoS, and make sure it has enough native gas for the transaction.

faq.q: How long does bridge to polygon take?
faq.a: Timing depends on the route, token, network congestion, and wallet confirmations; rely on the portal status and explorer records rather than fixed estimates.

faq.q: What should I check before I bridge to polygon?
faq.a: Confirm the official domain, token, destination network, wallet address, approvals, and gas details; bridges involve smart-contract and operational risk.

footer_note: Not the official app; verify portal.polygon.technology before signing. Educational content only, not financial advice.
